RimHeroes.FeatDef.label: Empowered Spell
RimHeroes.FeatDef.description: You pour raw force into the casting and let it overflow. A solid boost to spell power.

RimHeroes.FeatDef.label: Careful Spell
RimHeroes.FeatDef.description: You shape the spell so it spares friend and self alike. You take less damage in the chaos of battle.

RimHeroes.FeatDef.label: Subtle Spell
RimHeroes.FeatDef.description: You cast with no word and no gesture to give you away. Composed under pressure and more persuasive.

RimHeroes.FeatDef.label: Quickened Spell
RimHeroes.FeatDef.description: You fold a heartbeat of time around the casting. Your spells come off cooldown markedly faster.

RimHeroes.FeatDef.label: Twinned Spell
RimHeroes.FeatDef.description: You split the spell down the middle and send each half hunting. Your single-target spells also strike a second nearby foe.

RimHeroes.FeatDef.label: Agonizing Blast
RimHeroes.FeatDef.description: Your patron's gift bites deeper with every blast. A boost to spell power.

RimHeroes.FeatDef.label: Devil's Sight
RimHeroes.FeatDef.description: Darkness is just another room to you now. Better ranged accuracy.

RimHeroes.FeatDef.label: Armor of Shadows
RimHeroes.FeatDef.description: A cloak of living shadow that never leaves you. Better armour.

RimHeroes.FeatDef.label: Fiendish Resilience
RimHeroes.FeatDef.description: Something inhuman knits your wounds shut between breaths. Harder to hurt and harder to drop.

RimHeroes.FeatDef.label: Beguiling Influence
RimHeroes.FeatDef.description: There is something in your voice that was not there before, and people bend to your words.

RimHeroes.FeatDef.label: Eldritch Mind
RimHeroes.FeatDef.description: Your mind is anchored to something far older and colder than fear. Very hard to break.
